tweets.full_text:
I think the challenge is that everyone can now build apps

But

1) almost nobody has distribution (like an audience), or

2) the money to pay for distribution (ads or UGC), or

3) the creative genius to get distribution for free (classically called guerilla marketing)

tweets.full_text:
You only need 1 hour.

1 hour of building. 1 hour of writing. 1 hour of lifting. 1 hour of studying.

1 hour of any form of bettering yourself, because it quickly compounds.

1 hour feels like nothing until you look back 365 hours later and everything's changed.
tweets.summary: 自我提升建议：每天1小时建设、写作、健身、学习，365天后质变。通用励志内容，与AI无关。
